title: Samagra Shiksha Hisar – Education Volunteer – 38 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Samagra Shiksha Hisar Education Volunteer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 38 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Samagra Shiksha Hisar Recruitment 2026 for 38 posts of Education Volunteer. Candidates with B.Ed./Spl. B.Ed Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 26-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DPC Samagra Shiksha Hisar official website.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DPC Samagra Shiksha Hisar Education Volunteer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
